columns.Name: FEEDBACK_REQ_TMPL_ID
columns.Comments: Primary key of the Feedback Request Templates table

columns.Name: SHARE_WITH_MANAGERS
columns.Comments: Comma seperated values to determine the managers to share feedback with.

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to HR_ALL_ORGANIZATION_UNITS

columns.Name: STATUS_CODE
columns.Comments: Status of the Feedback Request template

columns.Name: QUESTIONNAIRE_ID
columns.Comments: Questionnaire added to the template

columns.Name: STANDARD_ALERT_DAYS
columns.Comments: Days before the due date when the standard alert is triggered.

columns.Name: TEMPLATE_TYPE
columns.Comments: Column to determine the feedback type

columns.Name: DEFAULT_TEMPLATE_FLAG
columns.Comments: Flag which indicates the selected template is the default template for the particular template type

columns.Name: ALLOW_ADTNL_QSTNS_FLAG
columns.Comments: Flag to control allowing additional questions to Questionnaire

columns.Name: GOAL_ATTRIBUTE_LIST
columns.Comments: List of goal attributes to be shared in a feedback request

columns.Name: CUSTOM_FEEDBACK_TITLE
columns.Comments: Custom feedback questionnaire title for questionnaire form

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: INCLUDE_IN_PERF_DOC_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates if the feedback request region displays in the performance document.
